rows.label: qev030201_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Hmm? You there,
you aren't a Bias from the Cavern Clan, are you? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Who are you, da?
What did you come to a place like this for, da? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_JNK0010
rows.name: Self-Introduction[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_SEL0011
rows.name: Explain that you are an Earthling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_JNK0020
rows.name: Explain[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_SEL0021
rows.name: Explain that you came to rescue Oll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0003
rows.name: Why is an Earthling in a place like this... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Eh?
You came to save me because the Chieftain asked you to!?
Ooh! Is that true! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0005
rows.name:
...What? You came because the Chieftain asked you to?
So the Chieftain really was working behind the scenes
to save us after all! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0006
rows.name:
The key to this room should be held by a Cavern Clan Bias
named Ajiba Falgo, da.
I want you to defeat him and get it for me, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0007
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, zo!
I have to save my little brother, da.
I can't afford to stay captured in a place like this, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0008
rows.name:
The key to this room is held by a Cavern Clan Bias
named Ajiba Falgo, zo!
Defeat him and get the key for me. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0009
rows.name: Thank you for saving me! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Now I can go save my younger brother Rada!
Even if it costs me my life, I'll rescue him, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hmm... What!?
You're saying you already saved Rada! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0012
rows.name:
I see!
Then I'd better hurry back to where everyone is! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0013
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]!
Thank you for absolutely everything!
Next time, let's eat meat together with Rada, the three of us! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hmm... What?
You're going to go save him? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0015
rows.name:
I see...
I've been starving ever since I was captured here, so
I... don't really have much strength right now. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Understood! I'll leave everything to you, zo!
It seems my little brother is also captured in this fortress,
just like me, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030201_MSG0017
rows.name:
Make sure you rescue him safely!
I'm counting on you, zo! [ST:wait ]
